items.title: Transportation Analytics Market Size to Reach USD 68.72 Billion by 2032 Due to Surging Need for Real-Time Data Insights | Research by SNS Insider
items.description: The Transportation Analytics Market is witnessing rapid growth due to the increasing need for real-time data insights to optimize traffic flow, reduce congestion, and enhance public safety.Austin, Sept. 16, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- The Transportation Analytics Market, valued at USD 13.07 billion in 2024, is projected to reach USD 68.72 billion by 2032, registering a CAGR of 23.14% during 2025–2032.
